name: Electric Screwdriver
description: You’ve located the Precision Electric Screwdriver, the FRC equivalent of a magic wand. When you have thirty seconds to swap a sensor before the 'Ready' green light hits the field, nobody has time for manual wrist-turning. This specific unit is likely the most sought-after tool in the lab, which explains why its components are scattered across three different zip codes (or at least three different desk zones).
